note: Google's published Gemini API pricing. The Antigravity-observed model display string 'Gemini 3.5 Flash (Medium)' (gen_metadata field 21) is priced against Google's published Gemini Flash rate card (model gemini-2.5-flash, the current published Flash model) as the closest published pricing for the Flash family. Rates are USD per 1,000,000 tokens, numerically identical to micro-USD per token (same convention as internal/pricing/table.go's Claude rates).
